name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.49: clean product backgrounds so the kiosk tile colour wraps the product. New clean-backgrounds job re-processes every image still flagged imageHasBackground from its original source with white knockout (edge flood-fill keeps white inside the product), reports heavy clears for human review and lists non-white backdrops that need manual replacement, with thumbnail review in the dashboard. Originals retained so it is reversible. Cumulative over v5.48.
